changes: CHANGE-001: Logo **:` to `*: — all logo size classes now use direct-child selector
CHANGE-002: calculateStartHeight() subtracts marginTop so fixed mode triggers when margin area reaches viewport top

code1_logoStarTSX.description: All logo classes in HeaderMain.tsx use *: not **: (2 occurrences)
code1_logoStarTSX.detail: Both logo anchor/uploader elements at lines 533 and 544 use the class string 'block self-stretch text-white w-auto *:w-auto *:max-w-full *:h-full *:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:*:max-h-[26px] md:*:max-h-[58px] focus-visible:outline-dotted focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'. No ** variants present in either occurrence.

code2_logoStarPHP.description: Logo class in HeaderMain.php uses *: not **: (1 occurrence)
code2_logoStarPHP.detail: Logo anchor at line 76 uses the class string 'block self-stretch text-white w-auto *:w-auto *:max-w-full *:h-full *:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:*:max-h-[26px] md:*:max-h-[58px] focus-visible:outline-dotted focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-white focus-visible:outline-offset-2'. Exact match with TSX. No ** variants present.

code3_jsMarginTopSubtraction.detail: Line 100: 'startHeight -= parseInt( window.getComputedStyle( header ).marginTop, 10 ) || 0;' inserted after the previousElementSibling loop and adminBar addition (lines 90-99) and before the CSS property set (line 101). This means fixed mode triggers when scrollY > (sibling heights + adminBar - marginTop), i.e. precisely when the top edge of the margin area (not the element box) reaches the viewport top.

code4_tsxEditorMarginTopSubtraction.detail: Line 166: 'startHeight -= parseInt(iframeWin!.getComputedStyle(header).marginTop, 10) || 0;' inserted after the previousElementSibling loop (lines 160-165) and before the CSS property set (line 167). Uses iframeWin!.getComputedStyle (not window.getComputedStyle) correctly, as the editor renders inside an iframe. The TSX editor scroll preview now triggers at the same logical point as the frontend JS.

frontend1_logoRendering.description: Logo renders correctly with proper max-height constraints
frontend1_logoRendering.detail: At 1440px the logo (insect icon + IGNITE wordmark) renders cleanly at the expected height inside every header variation. The *: direct-child selector correctly constrains the immediate img/svg child to max-h-[58px] on desktop and max-h-[26px] on mobile without affecting deeper descendants. No logo overflow, distortion, or size regression observed across any breakpoint or browser. The switch from **: to *: has no visible negative effect since the logo element has only one direct child (the img or SVG).

frontend2_fixedScrollTrigger.description: Fixed-on-scroll activates at the right scroll position (margin area reaching viewport top)
frontend2_fixedScrollTrigger.detail: Scroll-to-2000px screenshot at 1440px shows the header correctly in its fixed/scrolling state: pill sits flush at the viewport top (mt-0 active via [&.scrolling]:mt-0), logo and nav items render correctly at fixed size, spacer below holds the layout gap. The marginTop subtraction in calculateStartHeight means the .scrolling class is added when the visual top of the nav bar pill (not the top of the wrapper's margin gap) is about to leave the viewport, giving the smoothest possible transition with no premature or late triggering.

passedChecks: TSX logo ImageDropUploader element: *:w-auto *:max-w-full *:h-full *:object-contain max-md:*:max-h-[26px] md:*:max-h-[58px] (line 533)
TSX logo anchor element: identical *: class string (line 544)
PHP logo anchor element: identical *: class string (line 76)
No ** variants present in any logo class in any file
JS calculateStartHeight subtracts getComputedStyle(header).marginTop before setting --start-height (line 100)
TSX editor calculateStartHeight subtracts iframeWin.getComputedStyle(header).marginTop before setting --start-height (line 166)
Logo renders at correct max-height across all breakpoints and browsers
Fixed header sits cleanly at viewport top with no gap (scrolling state)
Spacer correctly reserves layout space when header is fixed
All 10 variations render correctly across 375/768/1024/1440 in chromium, firefox, and webkit

supplementary.purpose: Close-up viewport view confirming logo renders at correct max-height on desktop
Confirms fixed-on-scroll activates correctly: header at viewport top, mt-0 active, no doubled spacing

visualObservations.375px: Mobile layout. Logo (insect + IGNITE) renders at max-h-[26px] inside each variation — small but readable. All 10 variations present. Overlay mode visible near bottom. No logo sizing issues.
visualObservations.768px: Tablet, mobile layout applies (below 960px breakpoint). Logo at mobile height. All variations correct.
visualObservations.1024px: Desktop layout. Logo at max-h-[58px] — full-size insect icon + wordmark. Consistent across all 10 variations. Nav items horizontal, utility row visible.
visualObservations.1440px: Full desktop. Logo at max-h-[58px] across all variations. First two variations ('Full Content' both instances) show the complete logo correctly. Fixed scroll state (supplementary screenshot): logo renders at same height in fixed mode, pill flush to viewport top.
